decisions.question: Config file format, locations, and precedence
decisions.chosen: TOML with dotted key paths, two files, project > user > default

decisions.question: Credential handling and env var overrides
decisions.chosen: Env var override with config-file blocklist

decisions.question: Sync protocol and timing
decisions.chosen: Per-key incremental sync on every mutating command

decisions.question: CloudBackend trait implementation
decisions.chosen: Local cache wrapping LocalBackend + rust-s3 behind feature flag
